canonicalPhaselock: transfer/theory/prediction/curiosity/value/commons -> CoherenceLattice emergent-domain formalization -> Sophia emergent-domain audit -> Publisher field-birth overlays -> human/community/scientific ratification pathways
ethicalBoundaryNotice: No automatic canon formation, discipline ranking, sovereignty claims, or rights mutation from emergent-domain overlays.
